title: 3 Common Money Mindset Mistakes

segments.text: Believing money is scarce limits your potential.
But shifting your perspective can unlock abundance.
Focusing solely on saving may keep you poor.
And comparing yourself to others is toxic.
These mistakes trap you in a scarcity mindset.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Avoid these common traps to grow your wealth mindset. Follow for daily money wisdom! 💡
